summary: Independent read-only QA accepts the M7 topology recovery planning package. The package records the third product-owner REQUEST_CHANGES as an authoritative topology blocker, not visual polish; ADR-010 rejects rectangular-grid disguise and defines polygon governance plus explicit route/transport graph; content lock remains blocked with content_lock_accepted=false; M7 exit remains DRAFT; and downstream topology tasks remain DRAFT until this package enters origin/main.

tests_run.result: Only PROJECT_STATUS.md, ADR, task/state, handoff, and route files changed; no apps, packages, content-source, tools, or .github changes.

tests_run.command: node .agents/skills/monsoon-studio-orchestrator/scripts/taskctl.mjs validate M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-RECOVERY-001 and related topology/content-lock tasks
tests_run.result: PASS: recovery, content lock, and all four downstream topology tasks are VALID.
M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 BLOCKED; M7-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 DRAFT; topology downstream tasks DRAFT.

tests_run.command: node .agents/skills/monsoon-studio-orchestrator/scripts/validate-handoff.mjs product-owner request, lead plan, R2 repair, systems R1, and systems R3 handoffs
tests_run.result: PASS: all reviewed handoffs are VALID.

tests_run.command: JSON parse/field check for goal-mode-state, model-routing-state, GOAL-MODE-CONTINUATION, and thread-registry
tests_run.result: PASS; active Human Gate fields are required=false and active_gate_task_id=null.

decisions.decision: Accept the topology recovery planning package and route it back to lead_orchestrator for PR integration.
M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-SCHEMA-001 may become READY only after this accepted recovery package enters origin/main.
This acceptance does not approve M7 content lock; M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 remains BLOCKED with content_lock_accepted=false.

risks.summary: Systems R3 handoff records a minimal ACCEPT result without detailed rationale.
risks.mitigation: QA independently reviewed the package and accepted it.

risks.summary: One superseded R2 route file remains READY_TO_SEND.
risks.mitigation: R3 route is SENT with submission id and ACCEPT result; current task/state points to QA and then lead integration.

risks.summary: Historical risk entries still mention the earlier systemic-recovery reconsideration state.
risks.mitigation: Active gate fields and continuation state correctly say no Human Gate is waiting.

requested_action: Integrate the accepted topology recovery planning package through PR/CI/main, close M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-RECOVERY-001 after main integration, then make M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-SCHEMA-001 READY.
